svg.title: M40 next optimization attack map
svg.desc: Ranked post-M40 optimization targets, showing native engine memory as the first diagnostic target, followed by incomplete pinyin behavior, Track B profile work, short-key ratios, and separate browser-harness work.
svg.text: Start with measured owners. Native M40 long-row latency is closed.
Remaining work splits into memory, behavior parity, profile-specific guards, and separate browser evidence.

g.text: Track A peak 123,957,248 B; librime same-run rows are roughly 13-17 MB.
Next action: heap-owner profile before storage changes.
cszysmsrsd and zybfshmsru are bounded but export 0 candidates.
Next action: capture upstream output before calling them wins.
50+ Cantonese guard row median is 196.387 us/op; p95 has Windows outliers.
Next action: separate TypeDuck-profile plan only if needed.
hao is 3.237x and ni is 3.867x, still inside the 5x guard with small absolute medians.
Next action: defer unless target tightens.
Do not infer from native M40. Use rebuilt runtime and real-browser evidence for yune-web claims.
